  • Method Details

    • linearSearch

      public static <D> int linearSearch(D[] array, Comparator<D> comparator, D target, int start, int end)
      Type Parameters:
      D - the type of the elements in the array
      Parameters:
      array - the array that will search in
      comparator - the order of the elements
      target - the element that needs to be searched
      start - the start index (inclusive) of the array
      end - the end index (exclusive) of the array
      Returns:
      the index of the element if found, -1 if not found

    • linearSearch

      public static <D> int linearSearch(List<D> list, Comparator<D> comparator, D target, int start, int end)
      Type Parameters:
      D - the type of the elements in the list
      Parameters:
      list - the list that will search in
      comparator - the order of the elements
      target - the element that needs to be searched
      start - the start index (inclusive) of the list
      end - the end index (exclusive) of the list
      Returns:
      the index of the element if found, -1 if not found

    • binarySearch

      public static <D> int binarySearch(D[] array, Comparator<D> comparator, D target, int start, int end)
      Type Parameters:
      D - the type of the elements in the array
      Parameters:
      array - the array that will search in
      comparator - the order of the elements
      target - the element that needs to be searched
      start - the start index (inclusive) of the array
      end - the end index (exclusive) of the array
      Returns:
      the index of the element if found, -(insertPoint + 1) if not found

    • binarySearch

      public static <D> int binarySearch(List<D> list, Comparator<D> comparator, D target, int start, int end)
      Type Parameters:
      D - the type of the elements in the list
      Parameters:
      list - the list that will search in
      comparator - the order of the elements
      target - the element that needs to be searched
      start - the start index (inclusive) of the list
      end - the end index (exclusive) of the list
      Returns:
      the index of the element if found, -(insertPoint + 1) if not found

      Parameters:

      target - the element that needs to be searched

      end - the end index (exclusive) of the array
